hero.label: For Malaysian F&B operators
hero.title: We Help F&B Businesses Grow Online.
hero.subtitle: GrabFood and Foodpanda performance marketing, plus POS setups that scale — built for cafes, hawkers, cloud kitchens, and restaurants across the Klang Valley.
hero.trustBadge: Trusted by 50+ F&B businesses across Klang Valley

grabfood.title: GrabFood & Foodpanda Marketing
grabfood.blurb: Menu optimisation, voucher campaigns, in-app ads, and monthly performance reports tuned to Malaysian F&B rhythms — CNY, Raya, Deepavali, month-end paydays.

pos.title: POS System Solutions
pos.blurb: StoreHub and Slurp installs with direct GrabFood and Foodpanda integration. No more double-entry on busy nights. On-site training included.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We audit your listings, POS, and operations to find the specific leaks costing you orders.

strategize.title: Strategize
strategize.description: We build a 90-day plan matched to your kitchen capacity and neighbourhood — not a generic template.

execute.title: Execute
execute.description: Menu shoots, ad setup, POS installation, staff training. We handle the boots-on-the-ground delivery.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.description: Monthly reporting, A/B tests, and playbook updates. What works on Monday gets doubled down on Friday.

finalCta.heading: Ready to grow your F&B business?

header.title: Growth marketing + POS, built for Malaysian F&B.
header.intro: Two tracks that work independently or together. Most clients start with one and add the other within their first quarter.

grabfood.label: 01 / Service
grabfood.title: GrabFood & Foodpanda Marketing
grabfood.blurb: Listings that convert, campaigns tuned to Malaysian rhythms, and reporting that actually tells you what to do next week.

setup.title: Store Setup & Optimisation
setup.description: Menu photography, pricing strategy, and descriptions designed for delivery-platform conversion — not dine-in menu copy.

ads.title: Ads Management
ads.description: In-app ad buying across both platforms. Audience targeting, budget pacing, and daypart bidding tuned weekly.

campaigns.title: Promotion & Campaign Planning
campaigns.description: Voucher strategy, seasonal pushes for CNY, Raya, Deepavali, MDCC — the calendar that matters to Malaysian customers.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
analytics.description: Monthly reports with ROI, repeat-customer rate, and specific next-quarter actions. No vanity metrics.

pos.label: 02 / Service
pos.title: POS System Solutions
pos.blurb: Modern POS that integrates with delivery apps out of the box. Installed on-site by our team, not shipped for you to figure out.

setup.title: POS Hardware & Software Setup
setup.description: End-to-end install of StoreHub or Slurp — receipt printers, cash drawers, kitchen display, and full staff training.

menu.title: Menu & Inventory Management
menu.description: Digital menu sync across dine-in and delivery. Real-time stock tracking so you stop running out of the wrong items.

integration.title: Integration Services
integration.description: Direct connection to GrabFood and Foodpanda. Incoming orders land in your POS automatically — no double-entry.

support.title: Ongoing Support & Maintenance
support.description: Same-day hotline support, firmware updates, and quarterly check-ins. 98% first-call resolution over the last 12 months.

header.title: Real Results for Real F&B Businesses.
header.intro: Three stories, one pattern: specific diagnoses, month-by-month execution, and numbers that survive external audit.

Book.title: Book Your Free 30-Min Consultation
Book.intro: No slides. We look at your current listings, ad spend, and POS setup, and walk you through what we'd change in the first 30 days.

takeaways.label: You'll leave with
takeaways.item1: A ranked list of specific changes we'd make to your GrabFood or Foodpanda listings
takeaways.item2: A realistic order-growth target matched to your kitchen capacity
takeaways.item3: An honest read on whether we're a fit — no hard sell

testimonial.quote: We went from 40 GrabFood orders a day to 180+ in under 3 months. The menu photography alone paid for itself in the first two weeks.
testimonial.author: Wei Ming

confirmed.label: Booked

confirmed.body: Check your email for the calendar invite. We'll also send a short questionnaire so the session starts with context, not introductions.

hero.title: Grow With Us
hero.intro: We're a small team building the growth playbook for Malaysian F&B. Four disciplines, one shared belief: specific work compounds.

values.label: 01 / How we work
values.heading: Four things we hold the line on.

impact.title: Impact-driven
impact.description: We measure ourselves on client revenue moved, not reports delivered.

client.title: Client-obsessed
client.description: We pick up the phone, do the site visit, stay through the closing shift when it matters.

learning.title: Always learning
learning.description: Platform algorithms change weekly. We test, document, share, repeat.

team.title: Team first
team.description: We cover each other. Nobody ships a deliverable they'd be embarrassed to stand behind.

hero.title: Become an Authorised Partner.
hero.intro: Build revenue on top of Malaysia's F&B growth story. Three partnership tracks, transparent commission structures, and a team that actually picks up the phone.

pos-hardware.title: POS Hardware Partner
pos-hardware.description: Supply hardware to our client installs. We handle deployment and training; you handle logistics and post-sale.

marketing-channel.title: Marketing Channel Partner
marketing-channel.description: Agencies, creators, and consultants who want to offer our services under their brand or as a referral.
marketing-channel.bullet1: Up to 20% revenue share on closed deals
marketing-channel.bullet2: Training on our playbooks and case studies
marketing-channel.bullet3: Co-marketing slots on our monthly digest

strategic-referral.title: Strategic Referral Partner
strategic-referral.description: F&B landlords, suppliers, and associations who want a value-add for their network.
strategic-referral.bullet1: Flat referral fee on closed engagements

revenue.title: Revenue sharing
revenue.description: Transparent commission, paid monthly. No tiered gotchas, no quarterly clawbacks.

marketing.title: Co-marketing
marketing.description: Joint case studies, cross-promoted newsletters, and social coverage on our verified accounts.

training.title: Training & certification
training.description: Quarterly deep-dives on GrabFood and Foodpanda platform changes. Optional POS certification track.

support.title: Priority support
support.description: Shared Slack channel, same-day response on partner queries, first look at new service offerings.

whitelabel.title: White-label options
whitelabel.description: Agencies and resellers can offer our POS and marketing services under their brand with clean handoffs.

territories.title: Exclusive territories
territories.description: Strategic partners can lock exclusive rights in a geography or vertical, subject to performance minimums.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Our full privacy policy is being finalised with legal counsel. In plain terms today: we only collect the personal information you give us through forms (name, email, phone, business details, resume), we use it solely to respond to you and manage our engagement, and we don't sell or share it with third parties outside our service providers (email delivery, analytics, hosting).
privacy.contact: For specific questions about your data, email <email>hello@headupagency.com</email> or WhatsApp the number in our footer. A formal document will replace this page before public launch.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Our full terms of service are being finalised with legal counsel. In the meantime, the short version: services are provided under individual engagement contracts. Website content is informational and may change without notice. Case study metrics reflect specific client situations and aren't a promise of your results.
terms.contact: For specific questions about engagement terms, email <email>hello@headupagency.com</email>. A formal document will replace this page before public launch.
